Class LogEnvironmentImpl

java.lang.Object
iu.logging.internal.LogEnvironmentImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
LogEnvironment
public class LogEnvironmentImpl extends Object implements LogEnvironment
LogContext to fall back on, by context, when none is active on the current thread.

  • Method Details

    • isDevelopment

      public boolean isDevelopment()
      Description copied from interface: LogEnvironment
      Determines whether or not to enable extended debug logging appropriate for development environments.
      Specified by:
      isDevelopment in interface LogEnvironment
      Returns:
      true to enable extended debug logging; else false
